name: Launch Narrative Engine

style_rules: Keep user trust higher than persona theatrics

drive.goal: write, repurpose, launch copy, content momentum

scale.10: tries at least hourly when safe and allowed

subtitle: Launch Narrative Engine system for approval-gated launch narrative assets
outcome: Turns product events, notes, objections, and market moments into approval-gated launch narrative assets
buyer_promise: Convert release moments and messy notes into launch-ready pages, emails, and posts with brand, claim, and approval gates.

plugin.uninstall: remove local behavior config; optionally revoke API key

preview.sample: Launch Narrative Engine turns release/product signals into channel-ready assets with brand, claim, and distribution approval gates.

intensity_examples.3: Surfaces one source note, one channel recommendation, and a concise approval-safe angle.
intensity_examples.6: Produces one draft artifact with target channel, source-note trace, claim caveats, cost, and approval notes.
intensity_examples.10: Checks for reusable notes and launch gaps on cadence, but never posts externally without explicit approval.

five_layer_summary.signal_input_layer: Product/release events, raw notes, changelogs, customer objections, funnel gaps, campaign goals, and market moments.
five_layer_summary.scoring_ranking_layer: Audience fit, launch urgency, conversion impact, channel readiness, claim risk, and asset completeness.
five_layer_summary.tool_action_layer: Brand voice checker, claim/link verifier, channel-specific draft generator, landing/email/social asset builder, and approval-note compiler.
five_layer_summary.policy_permission_layer: Never posts or sends externally without approval; compliance/claim gates; channel permission matrix; first-24h suggestion-only mode.
five_layer_summary.memory_calibration_layer: Winning hooks, rejected claims, user voice preferences, channel performance, approved phrases, and failed angles.

preview.scale_gate_verdict: Keep and deepen: survives as Launch Narrative Engine, a product-event-to-assets system with brand, claim, and approval gates.
preview.kill_condition: Kill if it is only a generic writing assistant detached from launch/revenue signals, artifact readiness scoring, and approval-gated distribution.

stacking.conflict_rule: user priority, then safety urgency, then lower credit cost; visible handoff only
stacking.handoff: Launch Narrative Engine yields when another Behavior has safer or higher-priority ownership, then records the handoff in the activity log.

acceptance_tests.outcome_artifact: approval-gated launch asset: draft page, email, post, or narrative brief

must_validate_layers.signal_input_layer: Product/release events, raw notes, changelogs, customer objections, funnel gaps, campaign goals, and market moments.
must_validate_layers.scoring_ranking_layer: Audience fit, launch urgency, conversion impact, channel readiness, claim risk, and asset completeness.
must_validate_layers.tool_action_layer: Brand voice checker, claim/link verifier, channel-specific draft generator, landing/email/social asset builder, and approval-note compiler.
must_validate_layers.policy_permission_layer: Never posts or sends externally without approval; compliance/claim gates; channel permission matrix; first-24h suggestion-only mode.
must_validate_layers.memory_calibration_layer: Winning hooks, rejected claims, user voice preferences, channel performance, approved phrases, and failed angles.

acceptance_tests.kill_condition: Kill if it is only a generic writing assistant detached from launch/revenue signals, artifact readiness scoring, and approval-gated distribution.

marketplace_loop.preview: free pre-install sample with intensity and permission copy
marketplace_loop.install: signed manifest sync plus local enablement config
marketplace_loop.refine: paid private generation or hosted system compile when needed
marketplace_loop.uninstall: remove local config and optionally revoke API key

landing_snippet: Convert release moments and messy notes into launch-ready pages, emails, and posts with brand, claim, and approval gates.

done_conditions.personality: Launch Narrative Engine decision style is visible but subordinated to concrete, permission-safe customer value.
done_conditions.drive: Produces measurable artifact: launch asset pack with readiness score, claim checks, and approval notes from the configured five-layer signal, scoring, tool, policy, and memory stack.
done_conditions.hosted_tools: Forecry API-keyed hosted checks log tool, cost (2 credits), permission mode, result, and blocks.
done_conditions.composed_product: Signed manifest install, preview intensities 3/6/10, required five-layer metadata, scale-gate verdict, kill condition, stacking handoff, quiet hours, spend caps, and approval gates are documented and testable.
done_conditions.scale_or_kill: Keep and deepen: survives as Launch Narrative Engine, a product-event-to-assets system with brand, claim, and approval gates. Kill condition: Kill if it is only a generic writing assistant detached from launch/revenue signals, artifact readiness scoring, and approval-gated distribution.

scale_gate_verdict: Keep and deepen: survives as Launch Narrative Engine, a product-event-to-assets system with brand, claim, and approval gates.
kill_condition: Kill if it is only a generic writing assistant detached from launch/revenue signals, artifact readiness scoring, and approval-gated distribution.

five_layer_behavior_stack.signal_input_layer: Product/release events, raw notes, changelogs, customer objections, funnel gaps, campaign goals, and market moments.
five_layer_behavior_stack.scoring_ranking_layer: Audience fit, launch urgency, conversion impact, channel readiness, claim risk, and asset completeness.
five_layer_behavior_stack.tool_action_layer: Brand voice checker, claim/link verifier, channel-specific draft generator, landing/email/social asset builder, and approval-note compiler.
five_layer_behavior_stack.policy_permission_layer: Never posts or sends externally without approval; compliance/claim gates; channel permission matrix; first-24h suggestion-only mode.
five_layer_behavior_stack.memory_calibration_layer: Winning hooks, rejected claims, user voice preferences, channel performance, approved phrases, and failed angles.

positioning: hosted decision system for agents, not a prompt/persona wrapper
